markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on goals, strategy, and next steps for GrowthX's engagement with Airbyte to enhance their content and SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airbyte is shifting focus to enterprise customers (2000+ employees, $5-10B+ revenue) with a strong emphasis on AI and data infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Current content strategy needs refinement: more bottom-of-funnel (BOFU) content, improved quality, and optimization of existing content](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [GrowthX will take over content production from Airbyte's current agency, collaborating on research and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Key metrics: qualified pipeline (stage 2 opportunities), sign-ups, and AI search traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

## Topics

### Airbyte's Business Context and Goals

  - [Experienced rapid growth: $2M to $9M ARR in about a year, mostly organic](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Targeting 3X growth to $21M ARR by year-end (50% enterprise, 50% self-serve)](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Shifting from cloud-based to on-premise, self-hosted enterprise solutions](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Positioning as an AI-first data infrastructure provider, enabling first-party data usage for AI model training](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)

### Target Audience and Messaging

  - [Primary: Data engineers, AI engineers, and their leadership](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Secondary: System integrators (e.g., Deloitte)](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Key selling points: Open-source, data sovereignty, vendor lock-in prevention](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [Challenge: Shifting perception from point-to-point ETL to core AI infrastructure provider](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)

### Content Strategy and Challenges

  - [Current volume: 30-50 articles/month, manually written by technical experts](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
  - [Shift towards more bottom-of-funnel (BOFU) content in recent months](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Issues with keyword cannibalization and topic overlap](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Need for higher-quality, technical content that resonates with the audience](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage CEO's podcast, customer calls, and weekly demo webinars for content](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)

### SEO and Performance Measurement

  - [Recently implemented HubSpot for attribution](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [Focus on pipeline influence and branded organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Desire for more sophisticated measurement of content impact on conversions](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)

### GrowthX Engagement Scope

  - [Taking over content production from current agency](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Collaborating on keyword research and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Potential for writer support for more technical or human-touch pieces](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=2802.0)
  - [Focus on content refresh, consolidation, and enrichment of existing materials](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)
  - [Exploring new content formats (e.g., podcast summaries, webinar recaps)](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=3168.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Airbyte to share access to GSC, brand guidelines, and additional resources](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=3313.0)
  - [GrowthX to send follow-up questions and requests via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=3326.0)
  - [Schedule weekly sync meetings, adjusting for the Friday kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=3336.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin initial research and competitor gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=3344.0)
  - [Develop content plan in Airtable for review and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=3360.0)
  - [Explore strategies for optimizing existing content for quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/N894yUXU5Tvgp8vY3UuAkNaac5rc9aEC?tab=summary&timestamp=3395.0)
